commands.review_summary:
The PR updates Gateway Chat Completions to parse tools/tool_choice, return tool_calls in sync and streaming responses, accept role:tool follow-ups, update docs/tests, and add a Docker OpenAI chat-tools lane.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current main lacks Chat Completions tools/tool_choice parsing, clientTools forwarding, and tool_calls response mapping, while the PR adds those paths.
